```{r}
        temp_se=integrate(function(x){return((beta_fun(x)-temp_real_beta(x))^2)},0,10)$value
        temp_se_seq=c(temp_se_seq,temp_se)
      }
      empty_error_temp_file[l,]=temp_se_seq
    }
     temp_mse=apply(empty_error_temp_file,1,mean)
     empty_mse=c(empty_mse,temp_mse)
}


mse_mat=matrix(empty_mse,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
ari_mat=matrix(empty_ari,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
colnames(ari_mat)=c(paste("gibbs",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
colnames(mse_mat)=c(paste("gibbs",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))

write.csv(mse_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_20gibbs.csv")
write.csv(ari_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_20gibbs.csv")

######################################################
M=1
temp_dir_path="C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/simulation2/ls/dt0630"

library(fda)
temp_dir=dir(temp_dir_path)
fun_1=function(t){return(sin((pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 1
fun_2=function(t){return(sin((2*pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 2
height_seq=NULL
K_max=5


real_beta_function1_1=function(x){return(fun_1(x)+fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_2=function(x){return(fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_3=function(x){return(-fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
beta_function_list=c(list(real_beta_function1_1),list(real_beta_function1_2),list(real_beta_function1_3))

real_label=rep(1:3,each=M*100)
N=length(real_label)
j=1
empty_mse=NULL
empty_ari=NULL
for (i in 1:length(temp_dir))
{
  load(paste(temp_dir_path,temp_dir[i],sep = "/"))
  temp_res=simulation2_res_ls
empty_ari=c(empty_ari,as.numeric(temp_res$assement_all_mat[c(1,3,5,7,9,11),1]))
  #j=1  gibbs; j=2  2021
  empty_error_temp_file=matrix(rep(0,6*N),nrow = 6)#空的mse 当前文件
    for (l in 1:6) 
    {
      temp_label=as.numeric(temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$labels[[1]])
      N=length(temp_label)
      temp_fd_list=temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$beta_fd[[1]]
      temp_k_selected=temp_res$selected_K[(j-1)*6+l]
      temp_se_seq=NULL

      for (sample_index in 1:N) 
      {
        beta_fun=function(x){return(eval.fd(x,temp_fd_list[[temp_label[sample_index]]]))}
        temp_real_beta=beta_function_list[[real_label[sample_index]]]
        temp_se=integrate(function(x){return((beta_fun(x)-temp_real_beta(x))^2)},0,10)$value
        temp_se_seq=c(temp_se_seq,temp_se)
      }
      empty_error_temp_file[l,]=temp_se_seq
    }
     temp_mse=apply(empty_error_temp_file,1,mean)
     empty_mse=c(empty_mse,temp_mse)
}


mse_mat=matrix(empty_mse,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
ari_mat=matrix(empty_ari,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
colnames(ari_mat)=c(paste("gibbs",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
colnames(mse_mat)=c(paste("gibbs",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))

write.csv(mse_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_10gibbs.csv")
write.csv(ari_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_10gibbs.csv")

```

```{r}
M=0.5
temp_dir_path="C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/simulation4/m05"
temp_dir=dir(temp_dir_path)
library(fda)
N=length(real_label)
empty_ari=NULL

for (i in 1:length(temp_dir))
{
  load(paste(temp_dir_path,temp_dir[i],sep = "/"))
  temp_res=simulation2_res_ls
    empty_ari=c(empty_ari,as.numeric(temp_res$assement_all_mat[,1]))
}

ari_mat=matrix(empty_ari,byrow = T,ncol = 12)
colnames(ari_mat)=c(paste("gibbs",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")),paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
write.csv(ari_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_05.csv")

N=length(real_label)
empty_ari=NULL

for (i in 1:length(temp_dir))
{
  load(paste(temp_dir_path,temp_dir[i],sep = "/"))
  temp_res=simulation2_res_ls
 empty_ari=c(empty_ari,as.numeric(temp_res$assement_all_mat[,1]))

}

temp_dir=dir(temp_dir_path)

empty_ari=NULL

for (i in 1:length(temp_dir))
{
  load(paste(temp_dir_path,temp_dir[i],sep = "/"))
  temp_res=simulation2_res_ls
 empty_ari=c(empty_ari,as.numeric(temp_res$assement_all_mat[,1]))

}

write.csv(ari_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_10.csv")

```



lad函数

```{r}
parallel_simulation2_lad=function(seed_seq,M=0.5)
{set.seed(seed_seq)
  library(FdaCluReg)
fun_1=function(t){return(sin((pi*t/10))/5^0.5)}#basis fun 1
fun_2=function(t){return(sin((2*pi*t/10))/5^0.5)}#basis fun 2
function_list=list(fun_1,fun_2)#function list
sample_t=seq(0,10,0.1)#sampling time 
group_scale=c(100,100,100)*M#group scales
N=sum(group_scale)#number of samples
fda_coef_df=cbind(rnorm(N,0,1),rnorm(N,0,2))#basis coef. for X construction
fda_coef_df_list=list(fda_coef_df)
error_sd=0.2#standard error of observation error 
# generating X  
xij_temp=xij_fun(function_list=function_list,fda_coef_df=fda_coef_df,sample_t=sample_t,error_sd = 0.2)
xij_list=list(xij_temp)

## generating Y
###parameter setting  
#
set.seed(1)
#
N=nrow(fda_coef_df)#sample size 
reg_error1=rnorm(N,0,1)*0.2#epsilon-1
reg_error2=rt(N,3)*0.2#epsilon-2
reg_error3=(rchisq(N,3)-3)*0.2#epsilon-3
#
reg_var1=rep(1,N)#sigma-1
reg_var2=0.5*fda_coef_df[,1]+0.4*fda_coef_df[,2]#sigma-2
#
reg_coef_df=as.matrix(cbind(c(rep(1,200*M),rep(-1,100*M)),c(rep(1,100*M),rep(-1,200*M))))
reg_coef_df_list=list(reg_coef_df)#for multi variables
reg_intercept=c(rep(3,100*M),rep(-3,100*M),rep(0,100*M))

##########################
yi_temp_n_homo=yi_fun(function_list = function_list,
               fda_coef_df_list  = fda_coef_df_list,
               reg_coef_df_list = reg_coef_df_list,
               reg_intercept = reg_intercept,
               reg_var = reg_var1,
               reg_error = reg_error1)
yi_temp_t_homo=yi_fun(function_list = function_list,
               fda_coef_df_list  = fda_coef_df_list,
               reg_coef_df_list = reg_coef_df_list,
               reg_intercept = reg_intercept,
               reg_var = reg_var1,
               reg_error = reg_error2)
yi_temp_chisq_homo=yi_fun(function_list = function_list,
               fda_coef_df_list  = fda_coef_df_list,
               reg_coef_df_list = reg_coef_df_list,
               reg_intercept = reg_intercept,
               reg_var = reg_var1,
               reg_error = reg_error3)


########################
yi_temp_n_heter=yi_fun(function_list = function_list,
               fda_coef_df_list  = fda_coef_df_list,
               reg_coef_df_list = reg_coef_df_list,
               reg_intercept = reg_intercept,
               reg_var = reg_var2,
               reg_error = reg_error1)
yi_temp_t_heter=yi_fun(function_list = function_list,
               fda_coef_df_list  = fda_coef_df_list,
               reg_coef_df_list = reg_coef_df_list,
               reg_intercept = reg_intercept,
               reg_var = reg_var2,
               reg_error = reg_error2)
yi_temp_chisq_heter=yi_fun(function_list = function_list,
               fda_coef_df_list  = fda_coef_df_list,
               reg_coef_df_list = reg_coef_df_list,
               reg_intercept = reg_intercept,
               reg_var = reg_var2,
               reg_error = reg_error3)

Y_list=vector("list",6);
Y_list[[1]]=yi_temp_n_homo
Y_list[[2]]=yi_temp_t_homo
Y_list[[3]]=yi_temp_chisq_homo
Y_list[[4]]=yi_temp_n_heter
Y_list[[5]]=yi_temp_t_heter
Y_list[[6]]=yi_temp_chisq_heter
names(Y_list)=c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")


library(fda)
basis_need=fourier_basis=create.fourier.basis(c(0,10),10)# basis function
#smoothing 
sample_t=seq(0,10,0.1)#sampling time points
K_seq=2:5
true_label=rep(1:3,each=100*M)
var_ratio=0.9
rounds=100
burning_period=20
lambda=0.2
ncomp_l=1

simulation2_res_lad=simulation_results_function(X_list =xij_list,
                             Y=Y_list,
                             basis=basis_need,
                             sample_t=sample_t,
                             var_ratio=var_ratio,
                             K_max=5,
                             true_label=true_label,
                             rounds=rounds,
                             burning_period=burning_period,
                             lambda = lambda,
                             method="lad",
                             ncomp_u=10,ncomp_l=ncomp_l,seed=seed_seq,type = c(F,T))
save(simulation2_res_lad,file = paste("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/simulation4/m052021/lad/s4_",M,seed_seq,".RData",sep = ""))
print(seed_seq)
}


num_cores=10
library(parallel)
cl=makeCluster(num_cores)
clusterExport(cl,  envir = environment(),varlist =c("color_seq", "simulation_results_function"))
parLapply(cl,(1:100),parallel_simulation2_lad,M=0.5)
stopCluster(cl)
```
ls函数

```{r}
parallel_simulation2_ls=function(seed_seq,M=0.5)
{set.seed(seed_seq)
  library(FdaCluReg)
fun_1=function(t){return(sin((pi*t/10))/5^0.5)}#basis fun 1
fun_2=function(t){return(sin((2*pi*t/10))/5^0.5)}#basis fun 2
function_list=list(fun_1,fun_2)#function list
sample_t=seq(0,10,0.1)#sampling time 
group_scale=c(100,100,100)*M#group scales
N=sum(group_scale)#number of samples
fda_coef_df=cbind(rnorm(N,0,1),rnorm(N,0,2))#basis coef. for X construction
fda_coef_df_list=list(fda_coef_df)
error_sd=0.2#standard error of observation error 
# generating X  
xij_temp=xij_fun(function_list=function_list,fda_coef_df=fda_coef_df,sample_t=sample_t,error_sd = 0.2)
xij_list=list(xij_temp)

## generating Y
###parameter setting  
#
set.seed(1)
#
N=nrow(fda_coef_df)#sample size 
reg_error1=rnorm(N,0,1)*0.2#epsilon-1
reg_error2=rt(N,3)*0.2#epsilon-2
reg_error3=(rchisq(N,3)-3)*0.2#epsilon-3
#
reg_var1=rep(1,N)#sigma-1
reg_var2=0.5*fda_coef_df[,1]+0.4*fda_coef_df[,2]#sigma-2
#
reg_coef_df=as.matrix(cbind(c(rep(1,200*M),rep(-1,100*M)),c(rep(1,100*M),rep(-1,200*M))))
reg_coef_df_list=list(reg_coef_df)#for multi variables
reg_intercept=c(rep(3,100*M),rep(-3,100*M),rep(0,100*M))

##########################
yi_temp_n_homo=yi_fun(function_list = function_list,
               fda_coef_df_list  = fda_coef_df_list,
               reg_coef_df_list = reg_coef_df_list,
               reg_intercept = reg_intercept,
               reg_var = reg_var1,
               reg_error = reg_error1)
yi_temp_t_homo=yi_fun(function_list = function_list,
               fda_coef_df_list  = fda_coef_df_list,
               reg_coef_df_list = reg_coef_df_list,
               reg_intercept = reg_intercept,
               reg_var = reg_var1,
               reg_error = reg_error2)
yi_temp_chisq_homo=yi_fun(function_list = function_list,
               fda_coef_df_list  = fda_coef_df_list,
               reg_coef_df_list = reg_coef_df_list,
               reg_intercept = reg_intercept,
               reg_var = reg_var1,
               reg_error = reg_error3)


########################
yi_temp_n_heter=yi_fun(function_list = function_list,
               fda_coef_df_list  = fda_coef_df_list,
               reg_coef_df_list = reg_coef_df_list,
               reg_intercept = reg_intercept,
               reg_var = reg_var2,
               reg_error = reg_error1)
yi_temp_t_heter=yi_fun(function_list = function_list,
               fda_coef_df_list  = fda_coef_df_list,
               reg_coef_df_list = reg_coef_df_list,
               reg_intercept = reg_intercept,
               reg_var = reg_var2,
               reg_error = reg_error2)
yi_temp_chisq_heter=yi_fun(function_list = function_list,
               fda_coef_df_list  = fda_coef_df_list,
               reg_coef_df_list = reg_coef_df_list,
               reg_intercept = reg_intercept,
               reg_var = reg_var2,
               reg_error = reg_error3)

Y_list=vector("list",6);
Y_list[[1]]=yi_temp_n_homo
Y_list[[2]]=yi_temp_t_homo
Y_list[[3]]=yi_temp_chisq_homo
Y_list[[4]]=yi_temp_n_heter
Y_list[[5]]=yi_temp_t_heter
Y_list[[6]]=yi_temp_chisq_heter
names(Y_list)=c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")


library(fda)
basis_need=fourier_basis=create.fourier.basis(c(0,10),10)# basis function
#smoothing 
sample_t=seq(0,10,0.1)#sampling time points
K_seq=2:5
true_label=rep(1:3,each=100*M)
var_ratio=0.9
rounds=100
burning_period=20
lambda=0.2
ncomp_l=1

simulation2_res_ls=simulation_results_function(X_list =xij_list,
                             Y=Y_list,
                             basis=basis_need,
                             sample_t=sample_t,
                             var_ratio=var_ratio,
                             K_max=5,
                             true_label=true_label,
                             rounds=rounds,
                             burning_period=burning_period,
                             lambda = lambda,
                             method="ls",
                             ncomp_u=10,ncomp_l=ncomp_l,seed=seed_seq,type = c(F,T))
save(simulation2_res_ls,file = paste("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/simulation4/m202021/ls/s4_",M,seed_seq,".RData",sep = ""))
print(seed_seq)
}


num_cores=10
library(parallel)
cl=makeCluster(num_cores)
clusterExport(cl,  envir = environment(),varlist =c("color_seq", "simulation_results_function"))
parLapply(cl,(1:100),parallel_simulation2_ls,M=2)
stopCluster(cl)
1
```


lad结果汇总   
```{r}
M=0.5
temp_dir_path="C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/simulation4/m052021/lad"

library(fda)
temp_dir=dir(temp_dir_path)
fun_1=function(t){return(sin((pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 1
fun_2=function(t){return(sin((2*pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 2
height_seq=NULL
K_max=5


real_beta_function1_1=function(x){return(fun_1(x)+fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_2=function(x){return(fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_3=function(x){return(-fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
beta_function_list=c(list(real_beta_function1_1),list(real_beta_function1_2),list(real_beta_function1_3))

real_label=rep(1:3,each=M*100)
N=length(real_label)

empty_mse=NULL
empty_ari=NULL
for (i in 1:length(temp_dir))
{
  load(paste(temp_dir_path,temp_dir[i],sep = "/"))
  temp_res=simulation2_res_lad
empty_ari=c(empty_ari,as.numeric(temp_res$assement_all_mat[c(2,4,6,8,10,12),1]))
  #j=1  gibbs; j=2  2021
  empty_error_temp_file=matrix(rep(0,6*N),nrow = 6)#空的mse 当前文件
    for (l in 1:6) 
    {
      temp_label=as.numeric(temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$labels[[1]])
      N=length(temp_label)
      temp_fd_list=temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$beta_fd[[1]]
      temp_k_selected=temp_res$selected_K[(j-1)*6+l]
      temp_se_seq=NULL

      for (sample_index in 1:N) 
      {
        beta_fun=function(x){return(eval.fd(x,temp_fd_list[[temp_label[sample_index]]]))}
        temp_real_beta=beta_function_list[[real_label[sample_index]]]
        temp_se=integrate(function(x){return((beta_fun(x)-temp_real_beta(x))^2)},0,10)$value
        temp_se_seq=c(temp_se_seq,temp_se)
      }
      empty_error_temp_file[l,]=temp_se_seq
    }
     temp_mse=apply(empty_error_temp_file,1,mean)
     empty_mse=c(empty_mse,temp_mse)
}


mse_mat=matrix(empty_mse,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
ari_mat=matrix(empty_ari,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
colnames(ari_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
colnames(mse_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))

write.csv(mse_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_05lad.csv")
write.csv(ari_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_05lad.csv")
######################################################
M=2
temp_dir_path="C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/simulation4/m202021/lad"

library(fda)
temp_dir=dir(temp_dir_path)
fun_1=function(t){return(sin((pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 1
fun_2=function(t){return(sin((2*pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 2
height_seq=NULL
K_max=5


real_beta_function1_1=function(x){return(fun_1(x)+fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_2=function(x){return(fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_3=function(x){return(-fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
beta_function_list=c(list(real_beta_function1_1),list(real_beta_function1_2),list(real_beta_function1_3))

real_label=rep(1:3,each=M*100)
N=length(real_label)

empty_mse=NULL
empty_ari=NULL
for (i in 1:length(temp_dir))
{
  load(paste(temp_dir_path,temp_dir[i],sep = "/"))
  temp_res=simulation2_res_lad
 empty_ari=c(empty_ari,as.numeric(temp_res$assement_all_mat[c(2,4,6,8,10,12),1]))
  #j=1  gibbs; j=2  2021
  empty_error_temp_file=matrix(rep(0,6*N),nrow = 6)#空的mse 当前文件
    for (l in 1:6) 
    {
      temp_label=as.numeric(temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$labels[[1]])
      N=length(temp_label)
      temp_fd_list=temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$beta_fd[[1]]
      temp_k_selected=temp_res$selected_K[(j-1)*6+l]
      temp_se_seq=NULL

      for (sample_index in 1:N) 
      {
        beta_fun=function(x){return(eval.fd(x,temp_fd_list[[temp_label[sample_index]]]))}
        temp_real_beta=beta_function_list[[real_label[sample_index]]]
        temp_se=integrate(function(x){return((beta_fun(x)-temp_real_beta(x))^2)},0,10)$value
        temp_se_seq=c(temp_se_seq,temp_se)
      }
      empty_error_temp_file[l,]=temp_se_seq
    }
     temp_mse=apply(empty_error_temp_file,1,mean)
     empty_mse=c(empty_mse,temp_mse)
}


mse_mat=matrix(empty_mse,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
ari_mat=matrix(empty_ari,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
colnames(ari_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
colnames(mse_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
write.csv(mse_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_20lad.csv")
write.csv(ari_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_20lad.csv")

######################################################
M=1
temp_dir_path="C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/simulation2/lad"

library(fda)
temp_dir=dir(temp_dir_path)
fun_1=function(t){return(sin((pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 1
fun_2=function(t){return(sin((2*pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 2
height_seq=NULL
K_max=5


real_beta_function1_1=function(x){return(fun_1(x)+fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_2=function(x){return(fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_3=function(x){return(-fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
beta_function_list=c(list(real_beta_function1_1),list(real_beta_function1_2),list(real_beta_function1_3))

real_label=rep(1:3,each=M*100)
N=length(real_label)

empty_mse=NULL
empty_ari=NULL
for (i in 1:length(temp_dir))
{
  load(paste(temp_dir_path,temp_dir[i],sep = "/"))
  temp_res=simulation2_res_lad
 empty_ari=c(empty_ari,as.numeric(temp_res$assement_all_mat[c(2,4,6,8,10,12),1]))
  #j=1  gibbs; j=2  2021
  empty_error_temp_file=matrix(rep(0,6*N),nrow = 6)#空的mse 当前文件
    for (l in 1:6) 
    {
      temp_label=as.numeric(temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$labels[[1]])
      N=length(temp_label)
      temp_fd_list=temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$beta_fd[[1]]
      temp_k_selected=temp_res$selected_K[(j-1)*6+l]
      temp_se_seq=NULL

      for (sample_index in 1:N) 
      {
        beta_fun=function(x){return(eval.fd(x,temp_fd_list[[temp_label[sample_index]]]))}
        temp_real_beta=beta_function_list[[real_label[sample_index]]]
        temp_se=integrate(function(x){return((beta_fun(x)-temp_real_beta(x))^2)},0,10)$value
        temp_se_seq=c(temp_se_seq,temp_se)
      }
      empty_error_temp_file[l,]=temp_se_seq
    }
     temp_mse=apply(empty_error_temp_file,1,mean)
     empty_mse=c(empty_mse,temp_mse)
}


mse_mat=matrix(empty_mse,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
ari_mat=matrix(empty_ari,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
colnames(ari_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
colnames(mse_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
write.csv(mse_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_10lad.csv")
write.csv(ari_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_10lad.csv")
```

HL结果汇总   
```{r}
M=0.5
temp_dir_path="C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/simulation4/m052021/hl"

library(fda)
temp_dir=dir(temp_dir_path)
fun_1=function(t){return(sin((pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 1
fun_2=function(t){return(sin((2*pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 2
height_seq=NULL
K_max=5


real_beta_function1_1=function(x){return(fun_1(x)+fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_2=function(x){return(fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_3=function(x){return(-fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
beta_function_list=c(list(real_beta_function1_1),list(real_beta_function1_2),list(real_beta_function1_3))

real_label=rep(1:3,each=M*100)
N=length(real_label)

empty_mse=NULL
empty_ari=NULL
for (i in 1:length(temp_dir))
{
  load(paste(temp_dir_path,temp_dir[i],sep = "/"))
  temp_res=simulation2_res_hl
 empty_ari=c(empty_ari,as.numeric(temp_res$assement_all_mat[c(2,4,6,8,10,12),1]))
  #j=1  gibbs; j=2  2021
  empty_error_temp_file=matrix(rep(0,6*N),nrow = 6)#空的mse 当前文件
    for (l in 1:6) 
    {
      temp_label=as.numeric(temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$labels[[1]])
      N=length(temp_label)
      temp_fd_list=temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$beta_fd[[1]]
      temp_k_selected=temp_res$selected_K[(j-1)*6+l]
      temp_se_seq=NULL

      for (sample_index in 1:N) 
      {
        beta_fun=function(x){return(eval.fd(x,temp_fd_list[[temp_label[sample_index]]]))}
        temp_real_beta=beta_function_list[[real_label[sample_index]]]
        temp_se=integrate(function(x){return((beta_fun(x)-temp_real_beta(x))^2)},0,10)$value
        temp_se_seq=c(temp_se_seq,temp_se)
      }
      empty_error_temp_file[l,]=temp_se_seq
    }
     temp_mse=apply(empty_error_temp_file,1,mean)
     empty_mse=c(empty_mse,temp_mse)
}


mse_mat=matrix(empty_mse,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
ari_mat=matrix(empty_ari,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
colnames(ari_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
colnames(mse_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
write.csv(mse_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_05hl.csv")
write.csv(ari_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_05hl.csv")
######################################################
M=2
temp_dir_path="C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/simulation4/m202021/hl"

library(fda)
temp_dir=dir(temp_dir_path)
fun_1=function(t){return(sin((pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 1
fun_2=function(t){return(sin((2*pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 2
height_seq=NULL
K_max=5


real_beta_function1_1=function(x){return(fun_1(x)+fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_2=function(x){return(fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_3=function(x){return(-fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
beta_function_list=c(list(real_beta_function1_1),list(real_beta_function1_2),list(real_beta_function1_3))

real_label=rep(1:3,each=M*100)
N=length(real_label)

empty_mse=NULL
empty_ari=NULL
for (i in 1:length(temp_dir))
{
  load(paste(temp_dir_path,temp_dir[i],sep = "/"))
  temp_res=simulation2_res_hl
 empty_ari=c(empty_ari,as.numeric(temp_res$assement_all_mat[c(2,4,6,8,10,12),1]))
  #j=1  gibbs; j=2  2021
  empty_error_temp_file=matrix(rep(0,6*N),nrow = 6)#空的mse 当前文件
    for (l in 1:6) 
    {
      temp_label=as.numeric(temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$labels[[1]])
      N=length(temp_label)
      temp_fd_list=temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$beta_fd[[1]]
      temp_k_selected=temp_res$selected_K[(j-1)*6+l]
      temp_se_seq=NULL

      for (sample_index in 1:N) 
      {
        beta_fun=function(x){return(eval.fd(x,temp_fd_list[[temp_label[sample_index]]]))}
        temp_real_beta=beta_function_list[[real_label[sample_index]]]
        temp_se=integrate(function(x){return((beta_fun(x)-temp_real_beta(x))^2)},0,10)$value
        temp_se_seq=c(temp_se_seq,temp_se)
      }
      empty_error_temp_file[l,]=temp_se_seq
    }
     temp_mse=apply(empty_error_temp_file,1,mean)
     empty_mse=c(empty_mse,temp_mse)
}


mse_mat=matrix(empty_mse,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
ari_mat=matrix(empty_ari,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
colnames(ari_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
colnames(mse_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
write.csv(mse_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_20hl.csv")
write.csv(ari_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_20hl.csv")

M=1
temp_dir_path="C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/simulation2/hl"

library(fda)
temp_dir=dir(temp_dir_path)
fun_1=function(t){return(sin((pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 1
fun_2=function(t){return(sin((2*pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 2
height_seq=NULL
K_max=5


real_beta_function1_1=function(x){return(fun_1(x)+fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_2=function(x){return(fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_3=function(x){return(-fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
beta_function_list=c(list(real_beta_function1_1),list(real_beta_function1_2),list(real_beta_function1_3))

real_label=rep(1:3,each=M*100)
N=length(real_label)

empty_mse=NULL
empty_ari=NULL
for (i in 1:length(temp_dir))
{
  load(paste(temp_dir_path,temp_dir[i],sep = "/"))
  temp_res=simulation2_res_hl
 empty_ari=c(empty_ari,as.numeric(temp_res$assement_all_mat[c(2,4,6,8,10,12),1]))
  #j=1  gibbs; j=2  2021
  empty_error_temp_file=matrix(rep(0,6*N),nrow = 6)#空的mse 当前文件
    for (l in 1:6) 
    {
      temp_label=as.numeric(temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$labels[[1]])
      N=length(temp_label)
      temp_fd_list=temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$beta_fd[[1]]
      temp_k_selected=temp_res$selected_K[(j-1)*6+l]
      temp_se_seq=NULL

      for (sample_index in 1:N) 
      {
        beta_fun=function(x){return(eval.fd(x,temp_fd_list[[temp_label[sample_index]]]))}
        temp_real_beta=beta_function_list[[real_label[sample_index]]]
        temp_se=integrate(function(x){return((beta_fun(x)-temp_real_beta(x))^2)},0,10)$value
        temp_se_seq=c(temp_se_seq,temp_se)
      }
      empty_error_temp_file[l,]=temp_se_seq
    }
     temp_mse=apply(empty_error_temp_file,1,mean)
     empty_mse=c(empty_mse,temp_mse)
}


mse_mat=matrix(empty_mse,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
ari_mat=matrix(empty_ari,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
colnames(ari_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
colnames(mse_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
write.csv(mse_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_10hl.csv")
write.csv(ari_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_10hl.csv")
```

ls结果汇总   
```{r}
M=0.5
temp_dir_path="C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/simulation4/m052021/ls"

library(fda)
temp_dir=dir(temp_dir_path)
fun_1=function(t){return(sin((pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 1
fun_2=function(t){return(sin((2*pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 2
height_seq=NULL
K_max=5


real_beta_function1_1=function(x){return(fun_1(x)+fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_2=function(x){return(fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_3=function(x){return(-fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
beta_function_list=c(list(real_beta_function1_1),list(real_beta_function1_2),list(real_beta_function1_3))

real_label=rep(1:3,each=M*100)
N=length(real_label)

empty_mse=NULL
empty_ari=NULL
for (i in 1:length(temp_dir))
{
  load(paste(temp_dir_path,temp_dir[i],sep = "/"))
  temp_res=simulation2_res_ls
empty_ari=c(empty_ari,as.numeric(temp_res$assement_all_mat[c(2,4,6,8,10,12),1]))
  #j=1  gibbs; j=2  2021
  empty_error_temp_file=matrix(rep(0,6*N),nrow = 6)#空的mse 当前文件
    for (l in 1:6) 
    {
      temp_label=as.numeric(temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$labels[[1]])
      N=length(temp_label)
      temp_fd_list=temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$beta_fd[[1]]
      temp_k_selected=temp_res$selected_K[(j-1)*6+l]
      temp_se_seq=NULL

      for (sample_index in 1:N) 
      {
        beta_fun=function(x){return(eval.fd(x,temp_fd_list[[temp_label[sample_index]]]))}
        temp_real_beta=beta_function_list[[real_label[sample_index]]]
        temp_se=integrate(function(x){return((beta_fun(x)-temp_real_beta(x))^2)},0,10)$value
        temp_se_seq=c(temp_se_seq,temp_se)
      }
      empty_error_temp_file[l,]=temp_se_seq
    }
     temp_mse=apply(empty_error_temp_file,1,mean)
     empty_mse=c(empty_mse,temp_mse)
}


mse_mat=matrix(empty_mse,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
ari_mat=matrix(empty_ari,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
colnames(ari_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
colnames(mse_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))

write.csv(mse_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_05ls.csv")
write.csv(ari_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_05ls.csv")
######################################################
M=2
temp_dir_path="C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/simulation4/m202021/ls"

library(fda)
temp_dir=dir(temp_dir_path)
fun_1=function(t){return(sin((pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 1
fun_2=function(t){return(sin((2*pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 2
height_seq=NULL
K_max=5


real_beta_function1_1=function(x){return(fun_1(x)+fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_2=function(x){return(fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_3=function(x){return(-fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
beta_function_list=c(list(real_beta_function1_1),list(real_beta_function1_2),list(real_beta_function1_3))

real_label=rep(1:3,each=M*100)
N=length(real_label)

empty_mse=NULL
empty_ari=NULL
for (i in 1:length(temp_dir))
{
  load(paste(temp_dir_path,temp_dir[i],sep = "/"))
  temp_res=simulation2_res_ls
 empty_ari=c(empty_ari,as.numeric(temp_res$assement_all_mat[c(2,4,6,8,10,12),1]))
  #j=1  gibbs; j=2  2021
  empty_error_temp_file=matrix(rep(0,6*N),nrow = 6)#空的mse 当前文件
    for (l in 1:6) 
    {
      temp_label=as.numeric(temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$labels[[1]])
      N=length(temp_label)
      temp_fd_list=temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$beta_fd[[1]]
      temp_k_selected=temp_res$selected_K[(j-1)*6+l]
      temp_se_seq=NULL

      for (sample_index in 1:N) 
      {
        beta_fun=function(x){return(eval.fd(x,temp_fd_list[[temp_label[sample_index]]]))}
        temp_real_beta=beta_function_list[[real_label[sample_index]]]
        temp_se=integrate(function(x){return((beta_fun(x)-temp_real_beta(x))^2)},0,10)$value
        temp_se_seq=c(temp_se_seq,temp_se)
      }
      empty_error_temp_file[l,]=temp_se_seq
    }
     temp_mse=apply(empty_error_temp_file,1,mean)
     empty_mse=c(empty_mse,temp_mse)
}


mse_mat=matrix(empty_mse,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
ari_mat=matrix(empty_ari,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
colnames(ari_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
colnames(mse_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
write.csv(mse_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_20ls.csv")
write.csv(ari_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_20ls.csv")

######################################################
M=1
temp_dir_path="C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/simulation4/m102021/ls"

library(fda)
temp_dir=dir(temp_dir_path)
fun_1=function(t){return(sin((pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 1
fun_2=function(t){return(sin((2*pi*t/10))/(5^0.5))}#basis fun 2
height_seq=NULL
K_max=5


real_beta_function1_1=function(x){return(fun_1(x)+fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_2=function(x){return(fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
real_beta_function1_3=function(x){return(-fun_1(x)-fun_2(x))}
beta_function_list=c(list(real_beta_function1_1),list(real_beta_function1_2),list(real_beta_function1_3))

real_label=rep(1:3,each=M*100)
N=length(real_label)

empty_mse=NULL
empty_ari=NULL
for (i in 1:length(temp_dir))
{
  load(paste(temp_dir_path,temp_dir[i],sep = "/"))
  temp_res=simulation2_res_ls
 empty_ari=c(empty_ari,as.numeric(temp_res$assement_all_mat[c(2,4,6,8,10,12),1]))
  #j=1  gibbs; j=2  2021
  empty_error_temp_file=matrix(rep(0,6*N),nrow = 6)#空的mse 当前文件
    for (l in 1:6) 
    {
      temp_label=as.numeric(temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$labels[[1]])
      N=length(temp_label)
      temp_fd_list=temp_res[[j]][[l]]$selected_res$beta_fd[[1]]
      temp_k_selected=temp_res$selected_K[(j-1)*6+l]
      temp_se_seq=NULL

      for (sample_index in 1:N) 
      {
        beta_fun=function(x){return(eval.fd(x,temp_fd_list[[temp_label[sample_index]]]))}
        temp_real_beta=beta_function_list[[real_label[sample_index]]]
        temp_se=integrate(function(x){return((beta_fun(x)-temp_real_beta(x))^2)},0,10)$value
        temp_se_seq=c(temp_se_seq,temp_se)
      }
      empty_error_temp_file[l,]=temp_se_seq
    }
     temp_mse=apply(empty_error_temp_file,1,mean)
     empty_mse=c(empty_mse,temp_mse)
}


mse_mat=matrix(empty_mse,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
ari_mat=matrix(empty_ari,byrow = T,ncol = 6)
colnames(ari_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
colnames(mse_mat)=c(paste("2021",c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")))
write.csv(mse_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_10ls.csv")
write.csv(ari_mat,"C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_10ls.csv")
```


统计结果   
```{r}
m05=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_05gibbs.csv")
m10=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_10gibbs.csv")
m20=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_20gibbs.csv")

m05lad=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_05lad.csv")
m05ls=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_05ls.csv")
m05hl=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_05hl.csv")[-1,]

m20lad=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_20lad.csv")
m20ls=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_20ls.csv")
m20hl=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_20hl.csv")[-(1:2),]

m10lad=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_10lad.csv")
m10ls=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_10ls.csv")
m10hl=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/mse_10hl.csv")

m20_boot=rbind(m20,m20[sample(87,13),])
all_mse=data.frame(m05[,2:7],m10[,2:7],m20_boot[,2:7])

plot_mse=all_mse[,c(1,7,13,2,8,14,3,9,15,4,10,16,5,11,17,6,12,18)]
plot_name=c("x","homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")
par(mfrow=c(1,3))
for (i in 2:7) 
{
  temp_mse_df=data.frame(A1=m05[,i],B1=m05ls[,i],C1=m05hl[,i],D1=m05lad[,i],
                         A2=m10[,i],B2=m10ls[,i],C2=m10hl[,i],D2=m10lad[,i],
                         A3=m20_boot[,i],B3=m20ls[,i],C3=m20hl[,i],D3=m20lad[,i])
  boxplot(temp_mse_df,ylim=c(0,2.5),col=rep(c("red","orange","purple","blue"),3),main=plot_name[i])
}


```

```{r}
m05=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_05gibbs.csv")
m10=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_10gibbs.csv")
m20=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_20gibbs.csv")

m20_boot=rbind(m20,m20[sample(87,13),])
m05lad=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_05lad.csv")
m05ls=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_05ls.csv")
m05hl=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_05hl.csv")[-(1),]

m20lad=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_20lad.csv")
m20ls=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_20ls.csv")
m20hl=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_20hl.csv")[-(1:2),]

m10lad=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_10lad.csv")
m10ls=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_10ls.csv")
m10hl=read.csv("C:/users/spenc/desktop/simulation_results/ari_10hl.csv")



par(mfrow=c(1,3))
plot_name=c("x","homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")
for (i in c(2:7)) 
{
   temp_mse_df=data.frame(A1=m05[,i],B1=m05ls[,i],C1=m05hl[,i],D1=m05lad[,i],
                         A2=m10[,i],B2=m10ls[,i],C2=m10hl[,i],D2=m10lad[,i],
                         A3=m20_boot[,i],B3=m20ls[,i],C3=m20hl[,i],D3=m20lad[,i])
  boxplot(temp_mse_df,ylim=c(0,1),col=rep(c("red","orange","purple","blue"),2),main=plot_name[i])
}

mse_sample=matrix(rep(0,72),nrow = 6)
rownames(mse_sample)=c("homo_n","homo_t","homo_chisq","heter_n","heter_t","heter_chisq")
colnames(mse_sample)=paste(rep(c("s50","s100","s200"),each=4),rep(c("gibbs","ls","hl","lad"),3))

for (i in c(2:7)) 
{
mse_sample[i-1,]=c(c(mean(m05[,i]),mean(m05ls[,i]),mean(m05hl[,i]),mean(m05lad[,i])),
c(mean(m10[,i]),mean(m10ls[,i]),mean(m10hl[,i]),mean(m10lad[,i])),
c(mean(m20[,i]),mean(m20ls[,i]),mean(m20hl[,i]),mean(m20lad[,i])))
                  
}

```
